cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)

set(SdkRootDirPath "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/../vendor/mcuxsdk")

# Device-only build: no SDK board layer, the board configuration
# (pin_mux/clock_config/peripherals) is generated by MCUXpresso Config Tools
# into board/.
# Device selection lives in config.yaml at the repo root; scripts/build.py
# forwards it as CMake variables. Pass them by hand when invoking CMake directly.
if(NOT DEFINED device OR NOT DEFINED linker_script_path)
    message(FATAL_ERROR
        "device / linker_script_path not set.\n"
        "They are defined in config.yaml and forwarded by scripts/build.py — "
        "build via 'exec.bat build' or pass -Ddevice=... -Dlinker_script_path=... manually.")
endif()
set(CONFIG_TOOLCHAIN armgcc)

# The SDK's armgcc toolchain locates GCC via the ARMGCC_DIR environment variable.
if(NOT DEFINED ENV{ARMGCC_DIR})
    get_filename_component(_armgcc_dir "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/../env/tools/arm-gnu-toolchain" ABSOLUTE)
    set(ENV{ARMGCC_DIR} "${_armgcc_dir}")
endif()

# Kconfig processing needs a Python interpreter; use the repo venv.
if(NOT DEFINED Python3_EXECUTABLE)
    get_filename_component(_venv_python "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/../env/env/Scripts/python.exe" ABSOLUTE)
    if(EXISTS "${_venv_python}")
        set(Python3_EXECUTABLE "${_venv_python}")
    endif()
endif()

include(${SdkRootDirPath}/cmake/extension/mcux.cmake)

project(firmware LANGUAGES C CXX ASM)

file(GLOB_RECURSE APP_SOURCES RELATIVE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}
    "*.c"
    "*.h"
    "*.cpp"
    "*.hpp"
)

mcux_add_source(BASE_PATH ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR} SOURCES ${APP_SOURCES})
mcux_add_include(BASE_PATH ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR} INCLUDES . board utilities)

# The SDK keys optimization/debug flags and linker selection to its own build
# types (debug/release/...); build.py configures with MinSizeRel, so set them
# here for whatever build type is active.
mcux_add_armgcc_configuration(
    CC "-Os -g"
    CX "-Os -g -std=c++20 -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-threadsafe-statics -fno-use-cxa-atexit"
    LD "-Wl,-Map=${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/firmware.map"
)

# linker_script_path (from config.yaml) is relative to the repo root, so a
# custom script committed to the repo works the same as one from the SDK.
get_filename_component(_repo_root "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.." ABSOLUTE)
mcux_add_armgcc_linker_script(
    TARGETS ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}
    BASE_PATH ${_repo_root}
    LINKER ${linker_script_path}
)

# Some SDK component CMakeLists (e.g. components/flash) dereference ${board}
# unguarded, which breaks CMake's if() parsing in this board-less build. Set a
# dummy value here — after basic_settings.cmake and the Kconfig processing
# (both ran during project() above, in board-less mode) — so only the
# component dispatch below sees it and every board comparison is simply false.
set(board device_only)

include(${SdkRootDirPath}/CMakeLists.txt)

mcux_convert_binary(BINARY ${APPLICATION_BINARY_DIR}/${MCUX_SDK_PROJECT_NAME}.bin)
mcux_convert_binary(BINARY ${APPLICATION_BINARY_DIR}/${MCUX_SDK_PROJECT_NAME}.hex)
